summary: Iteration 2 frontend testing complete via Playwright. All 13 distinct test cases covering iteration-2 features and regression flows PASS (100%). Verified: progressive welcome streaming (steps 0..7 + welcome-ready 'Type /help to begin.'), /recruiter (Recruiter Snapshot + Junior DevOps Engineer + Project-Based + 4 strongest skills + Recommendation), /timeline (# Learning Timeline + 2024/2025/2026 with ├─ └─ tree chars), /why-this-candidate (Strengths/Weaknesses/Best Fit/Overall), /resume with PDF download button that fires a download (aveelash-hota-resume.pdf via jsPDF), projects/dockerized-app.md ASCII Architecture diagram (contains 'Architecture' and 'Node.js App'), right sidebar Index Stats with values projects=5, runbooks=7, labs=6, github repos=5 + last updated, Quick Commands now include /recruiter /why-this-candidate /timeline buttons firing commands, /help lists all new + original commands, plus regression coverage: /summary /projects /runbooks /skills /github /interview /gaps /why-hire /contact, non-slash & unknown-slash notices, history Up (recalls last cmd /xyz), Tab autocomplete (/sum -> /summary), /clear reset (welcome restored, no help block remaining).
critical_code_review_comments: All required data-testids present: welcome-stream, welcome-step-0..7, welcome-ready, block-recruiter, block-timeline, block-why-this-candidate, block-resume, download-resume-pdf, file-block-projects/dockerized-app.md, ctx-stats, quick-recruiter / quick-why-this-candidate / quick-timeline. Consistent with iteration 1.
PDF download wired correctly via jsPDF; page.expect_download() confirms a download event fires and suggested filename is 'aveelash-hota-resume.pdf'.
Index Stats values are dynamic (projects.length etc.) and read 5/7/6/5 as expected from /app/frontend/src/data/content.js.
Minor (non-blocking, cosmetic): In RightSidebar.jsx the LAST_UPDATED constant 'Dec 2026' is hardcoded; consider deriving from a single source if it needs to track build date.

Minor (non-blocking): Welcome streaming uses fixed setTimeout delays; if a user runs a slash command before streaming finishes, the welcome block continues to update — currently fine because steps just append.

Minor (non-blocking): WelcomeBlock has a small visual issue — the bullet character spec says '⏺ 26 files indexed' for the OK lines, while the rendered mark uses '✓' (matching the spec line '✓ 26 files indexed'). This matches the problem statement, no action needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend-only app at REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://sre-agent.preview.emergentagent.com. All iteration-2 features verified. Key selectors: [data-testid=welcome-stream], welcome-step-0..7, welcome-ready, block-recruiter/timeline/why-this-candidate/resume, download-resume-pdf (jsPDF), ctx-stats, quick-recruiter / quick-why-this-candidate / quick-timeline. File row testids: file-projects-dockerized-app-md (dashes for / and .). File block testids retain original path with slashes/dots, e.g. file-block-projects/dockerized-app.md. Use page.expect_download() to verify PDF download.
